visual.name: awKpiCardVisual
visual.description: AdventureWorks-style KPI card with label, value, delta pill and sparkline. Designed in Claude Design.

dataRoles.name: value
dataRoles.description: The headline metric shown on the card (e.g. Total Sales).

dataRoles.name: previousValue
dataRoles.description: Previous-period value used to compute the delta % when Delta % is not supplied.

dataRoles.name: deltaPct
dataRoles.description: Optional pre-computed delta as a percentage (e.g. 12.4 = +12.4%, or 0.124 if formatted as percent).

dataRoles.name: trendAxis
dataRoles.description: Date or category column that becomes the X-axis of the sparkline.

dataRoles.name: trendValue
dataRoles.description: Numeric measure plotted on the sparkline by Trend Axis.

label.description: Override the card label. Leaves the Value field's display name when blank.

invertDelta.description: When on, a negative delta is shown in green (good) and positive in red (bad). Use for cost-style metrics where lower is better.

smoothLine.description: Apply curve interpolation and downsample dense series for a smoother sparkline.

aggregation.description: How to roll up the per-row values into the big number. Use Average for ratio measures like AOV or Margin% when a Trend Axis is bound.
